TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Slovenia, title = Slovenia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Slovenia} }

S.FORM: Slovenia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 46 07 N, 14 49 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 20,273 sq km (maki' tay 155ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 20,151 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 122 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 1,978,029. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 22.80% , lhlahuy hya' ga 62.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 14.90%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ljubljana. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 25 na tay mtzyu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Borut Pahor, aring ryax 22 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Slovenia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 46 07 N, 14 49 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 20,273 sq km (maki' tay 155ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 20,151 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 122 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 1,978,029. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 22.80% , lhlahuy hya' ga 62.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 14.90%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ljubljana. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 25 na tay mtzyu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Borut Pahor, aring ryax 22 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: s~…ēlo*enia ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ljuő≤ljana. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mtzju Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ő≤orut pańßor, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
